task.en: Open Calendar and create a new ALL-DAY event titled exactly `Flight to Tokyo` on Friday, August 21, 2026. Make sure the `All-day` option is turned on. Put it on any calendar. Do not create any other events.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null; done; DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for TRG in $(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='trigger' AND tbl_name='CalendarItem';" 2>/dev/null); do sqlite3 "$DB" "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \"$TRG\";" 2>/dev/null; done; sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM CalendarItem WHERE summary='Flight to Tokyo';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$DB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; N=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT count(*) FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Flight to Tokyo';" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; A=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT ci.all_day FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Flight to Tokyo' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$A" = "1" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; U=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Flight to Tokyo' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); L=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Flight to Tokyo' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); { [ "$U" = "2026-08-21" ] || [ "$L" = "2026-08-21" ]; } && echo True || echo False
